Thanks for contributing to Domainer!

## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do, in 1-3 sentences? -->

## Why
<!-- Motivation, linked issue (e.g. Closes #42), or the user story this unblocks. -->

## How
<!-- Approach, key decisions, anything reviewers should know. -->

## Test plan
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Manually exercised the affected commands in Telegram (paste a screenshot if UI-facing)
- [ ] No new paid-API dependency introduced
- [ ] No new runtime dep added (or justified in the description)

## Screenshots / sample output
<!-- Optional but appreciated for new commands. -->
